name: Better Uptime Monitoring & Status Page API
what_it_does: All-in-one uptime monitoring, status page, and on-call management platform with REST API — monitoring websites, APIs, and services from 10+ locations with incident management, on-call scheduling, and beautiful branded status pages.
use_cases: Creating and managing uptime monitors programmatically via REST API
Querying availability and response time data for SLA reporting agents
Managing on-call schedules and escalation policies via API
Updating status page incidents and maintenance windows programmatically
Integrating Better Uptime alerts with other incident management workflows
not_for: Complex APM and distributed tracing (use Datadog or New Relic)
Infrastructure metrics collection (use Prometheus or VictoriaMetrics)
Real user monitoring and browser performance tracking
best_when: A team needs combined uptime monitoring, on-call management, and branded status pages in one product with clean REST API and modern UX.
avoid_when: You need deep APM, infrastructure metrics, or complex synthetic transaction monitoring.

auth.notes: Bearer token from Better Uptime account. Passed as Authorization Bearer header. Account-scoped access. Separate tokens for monitoring vs. on-call data. Token management in dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 10 monitors, 3-minute check intervals, 1 status page
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $24/month; Pro from $54; Business from $84; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Part of Better Stack (includes Logtail for log management). Good free tier. Rebranded from Better Uptime to Better Stack. Bundled pricing with logs saves cost. Modern UX compared to legacy tools.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; not prominently documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API well-documented covering monitors, incidents, on-call, and status pages. Webhook support for all events. Clean JSON responses. Good error messages with actionable descriptions.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Monitor CRUD operations are idempotent with same parameters. Incident creation and updates are idempotent for same values. All read operations idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Better Stack rebrand — old betteruptime.com API still works but documentation moving
On-call schedules require careful setup — API changes don't take effect until next rotation
Status page updates via API don't automatically notify subscribers — separate notification step
Rate limits not clearly documented — implement conservative retry backoff

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth. SOC2 Type II certified. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Czech-based company with strong European privacy focus.
